| Data Mining and Prediction Modelling in the Dairy Industry Using Time Series and Sliding Windows with Apache Spark 2. Data + AI summit 2016. Dublin. Ireland.                                                                                                                                                   | 2016    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exploratory classification of multiparous dairy cows based on fertility related phenotypes. 2017. Oral presentation on 68th Annual Conference of the European Federation of Animal Science, Tallinn, Estonia.                                                                                                   | 2017    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Investigating metabolic phenotypes in multiparous dairy cows by component analysis and clustering. 2017. Oral presentation on 68th Annual Conference of the European Federation of Animal Science, Tallinn, Estonia.                                                                                            | 2017    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| The use of technologies in dairy innovation. 2018. European Regions Research and Innovation Conference – Food Safety 2020 - Seinäjoki, Finland.                                                                                                                                                                 | 2018    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Can artificial intelligence be used on historical cow data to improve data quality and standardization of disease records. 2019. ICAR Annual meeting. Prague, Czech Republic.                                                                                                                                   | 2019    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Predicting the next life event of cows by applying deep learning on sequential and pictorial data. 2019. 9th European Conference on Precision Livestock Farming Cork, Ireland.                                                                                                                                  | 2019    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Modern tools for milk recording management. ICAR Annual meeting. Leeuwarden, the Netherlands. 2021. Online meeting.                                                                                                                                                                                             | 2021    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Prediction of persistency at day 305 in lactation at the moment of the insemination decision. ICAR Conference 2023. Toledo. Spain.                                                                                                                                                                              | 2023    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| A predictive model for hypocalcemia in dairy cows utilizing behavioural sensor data combined with deep learning. ADSA Annual Meeting. 2023. Ottawa. Canada.                                                                                                                                                     | 2023    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| A Foundational Framework for Animal Behavior Analysis Using Computer Vision, AI4AS 2025. Zurich. Switzerland.                                                                                                                                                                                                   | 2025    | [Presentation](https://prezi.com/view/DQDjSybENZwwYGDND86L/) |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| ICAR IDF initiative on sensor data for functional traits: Genetics and reference standards for rumination. Precision Dairy Farming 2025. Christchurch. New Zealand.                                                                                                                                             | 2025    |                                                              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| A Foundational Framework for Animal Behavior Analysis Using Computer Vision. Precision Dairy Farming 2025. Christchurch. New Zealand.                                                                                                                                                                           | 2026    | [Presentation](https://prezi.com/view/hUL4WyzK04Q4saxgJbqI/) |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
